name: chameleon-mcp
description: The shape-shifting MCP hub. morph() into any of 3,000+ MCP servers at runtime. No config files. No restarts.

use_chameleon_if: You need to call multiple different MCP servers in one session
You want to discover servers without pre-configuring them
You need hardware/audio tools that must stay alive between calls
You want to validate server quality before integrating
key_differentiators: Runtime morphing — no client restart needed
Persistent process pool for hardware/audio servers

optional.SMITHERY_API_KEY: Unlocks Smithery's 3,000+ verified server registry. Get at smithery.ai/account/api-keys
